title: artanthe nitida
intro: Artanthe nitida, also known as the "Ceylon fig tree," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Moraceae. The medicinal properties of Artanthe nitida include its ability to treat fever, inflammation, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and it has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as diarrhea, dysentery, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Artanthe nitida are often made into a paste or a decoction, and can be used externally to treat wounds and internally to treat digestive issues.
